bestResultsBanner.title: Best Results Achieved Here
bestResultsBanner.subtitle: Most users achieve significantly better AI results by taking new photos using your mobile camera. Our guided capture system helps you get the perfect angle and positioning every time.
bestResultsBanner.fallback: You can still upload existing photos if needed.

step.description_frontLeft45: Position your vehicle so you can see the front and left side clearly
step.description_side: Capture the full length of your vehicle
step.description_rearLeft45: Position your vehicle so you can see the rear and left side

feedback.positioning: Position your vehicle inside the guide

feedback.tooClose: Move back, vehicle is too close

feedback.horizonNotLevel: Keep camera level with the ground
feedback.error: Failed to capture image. Please try again.
feedback.notProperlyPositioned: Vehicle not properly positioned. Please try again.

billing.title: Pricing & Billing
billing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your automotive photography needs

manageSubscription.title: Manage Subscription
manageSubscription.subtitle: Update payment method, download invoices, or cancel subscription

usageBasedBilling.title: Usage-Based Billing
usageBasedBilling.subtitle: Need more than your plan includes? We offer flexible pay-as-you-go pricing for extra usage.

changePlans.question: Can I change plans anytime?
changePlans.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate any differences.

exceedLimit.question: What happens if I exceed my monthly limit?
exceedLimit.answer: You'll be charged for extra usage at our pay-as-you-go rates. We'll notify you when you're approaching your limit so there are no surprises.

rollover.question: Do unused generations roll over?
rollover.answer: No, unused generations reset at the end of each billing cycle. We recommend choosing a plan that matches your typical monthly usage.
